## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in with Jakub Rudnik, new hire at GrowthX, to discuss initial impressions and strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jakub is excited about GrowthX's speed, expertise, and differentiators compared to traditional agencies and AI writing tools](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Marcel highlighted key operational challenges: inconsistent account growth, delivery consistency, and onboarding/training new hires](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Both see significant potential in leveraging internal processes and expertise for external content/community building to drive growth](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

## Topics

### Initial Impressions and Excitement

  - [Jakub is highly impressed with the team's intelligence and helpfulness](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Appreciates the speed of content production and client pressure to publish quickly](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Excited about GrowthX's numerous differentiators against AI tools, agencies, and in-house hiring](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Account Growth: Some accounts not seeing desired growth despite content satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Delivery Consistency: Ensuring consistent quality across all accounts and flagging issues early](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Personnel Onboarding: Bridging knowledge gaps for new hires entering without full context](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

### Content and Community Strategy

  - [Leverage internal training materials for external-facing content (e.g., programmatic SEO playbook)](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Create reinforcing cycle: internal training → external webinars → community building → client acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Potential for low-cost subscription community (eilightgrowth.com) as recruiting ground and trust-builder](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

### Leveraging Team Expertise

  - [Combine diverse experiences (e.g., G2, ClickUp, Wise.com) to create comprehensive growth playbooks](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Potential addition of Matthew Panzerino (former TechCrunch editor-in-chief) as chief content officer](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Balance between editorial/brand-focused hires and growth/SEO-focused team members](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

### Bolt Project Opportunity

  - [Collaborate on creating a growth playbook for Bolt](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Utilize competitor analysis (e.g., GoodRx, Healthline) to showcase potential and scope (10,000-20,000 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Focus on keyword opportunities, including templates and generators](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to continue onboarding: review documentation, SOPs, and attend sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Watch Cohort 3 video for historical context on GrowthX's evolution](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Collaborate on Bolt project: create Notion page to brainstorm approach and analyze competitors](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Marcel to work on visualizing app-building templates for Bolt project](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Explore ways to quantify and present growth opportunities to Bolt's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/KyugSNer6Ma6U5qxpJfNBym6Menrujjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
